export.title: Export Image
export.scaleDesc: Image size multiplier. 2x will make the image twice as large.
apikey.title: Gemini API Key Management
apikey.warning1: Important: Your API key will only be stored for the duration of the current session and will be deleted upon refreshing or closing the page. It is not saved permanently for your security.
apikey.whereToGet: Where to get an API key?
apikey.howToGetTitle: How to get a Gemini API key
apikey.howToGet1: You can get a free API key to access Gemini models in Google AI Studio.
apikey.step1: • Go to Google AI Studio.
apikey.step3: • On the opened page, click the "Create API key in new project" button.
apikey.step4: • After a few seconds, your key will be generated. It will look like a long string of random characters.
apikey.step5: • Click the copy icon next to the key.
apikey.step6: • Return here and paste the copied key into the field above.
apikey.warning2: Important: Keep your key in a safe place and do not share it with anyone. The editor does not save the key permanently and does not transmit it anywhere except directly to the Google API when generating code.

template.name: Template name:
project.name: Project name:
project.idWarning: (Only latin letters, numbers and "_". Cannot start with a number)
feedback.title: Leave feedback
feedback.p1: Your feedback is extremely important for improving the editor. Bug reports, new ideas and just impressions help make "VereTkа" better.
feedback.p2: The most convenient way to share your thoughts is to fill out a special Google Form. It will only take a few minutes.
feedback.note: Note: Data about the editor version, your OS and browser will be added to the form automatically.
about.title: About "VereTka" editor
about.p1: VereTkа is a simple vector editor designed for quick creation of graphic primitives and generating corresponding Python code for the Tkinter library.
about.p2: It uses a local code generator for instant and reliable results, and can also use the Google Gemini API for experimental capabilities.
about.author: Idea & Development: Vitaliy Kushnir
about.support: Support: AI assistant powered by Google Gemini.
about.tech: Created with AI Studio Google, Visual Studio Code.

list.title: Objects
props.title: Properties
props.empty: Select an object to see its properties.
props.name: Name:
props.commentPlaceholder: This comment will be added to code
props.commentTooltip: Add an explanation that will appear in the generated code.
props.dashOffsetDesc: Shifts the start of the dash pattern.
prop.title.stipple: Select pattern to fill the shape.
props.stippleNote: Note: stipple may only work on X11.
prop.title.addNode: Add node between this and next
prop.title.tkX1: X-coordinate of top left Tkinter bounding box corner.
prop.title.tkY1: Y-coordinate of top left Tkinter bounding box corner.
prop.title.tkX2: X-coordinate of bottom right Tkinter bounding box corner.
prop.title.tkY2: Y-coordinate of bottom right Tkinter bounding box corner.
prop.title.state: Visibility and interactivity state of object.
prop.title.joinstyleDesc: Determines how corners look when connecting lines.
prop.title.arrowDesc: Add arrows to start, end, or both ends of the line.
prop.title.arrowTipOffset: Distance from line end to arrow tip.
prop.title.arrowWingsOffset: Distance from line end to the widest part of arrow.
prop.title.arrowWingWidth: Width of one arrow wing. Total width will be doubled.
prop.title.sides: Number of sides or rays in the shape.
prop.title.innerRadius: Radius of inner vertices of the star.
prop.title.topOffset: Horizontal offset of the top vertex relative to the base center.
prop.title.symmetric: Make the offset of top corners equal.
prop.title.offsetL: Offset of the top left corner inwards in percentage of width.
prop.title.offsetR: Offset of the top right corner inwards in percentage of width.
prop.title.angle: Tilt angle of side edges (90 degrees = rectangle).
fonts.error.notSupported: Your browser or environment does not support loading local fonts.
fonts.error.notFound: Local fonts not found or permission not granted.
fonts.success.noNew: No new unique system fonts found.
fonts.error.details: Failed to load fonts. Check console for details.
fonts.error.blocked: Font access is blocked by environment security policy.
fonts.error.denied: You denied permission to access fonts.
prop.title.smooth: Smooth corners to form a curve.
prop.title.splinesteps: Number of segments to approximate curve.
prop.title.arcStyle: Arc style: Sector (pieslice), Chord, or Arc.
prop.title.startAngle: Start angle of the arc in degrees (0 - 3 o\
prop.title.endAngle: End angle of the arc in degrees.
prop.title.extent: Length of the arc in degrees.
prop.title.lockExtent: Preserve arc length when changing its ends.
prop.title.anchor: The point on the text that will be placed at the specified coordinates.
prop.title.justify: Text alignment inside its bounding box.
prop.title.blockWidth: Text block width. 0 means no wrap.
prop.title.posY: Y-coordinate of bounding box top left corner.
prop.title.widthGeom: Geometric width of the object (without rotation).
prop.title.heightGeom: Geometric height of the object (without rotation).
prop.dash.removeSegment: Delete the last segment (stroke and gap)
